deploy.subtitle: Upload your ZIP and deploy bots, sites & APIs to Vercel
deploy.vercelBotWarningDesc: Vercel runs serverless functions. For bots, use webhook architecture, Cron Jobs, or API routes. Set framework to 'No framework' for plain Node.js bots.
deploy.dragDrop: Drag & drop your ZIP file here
deploy.envSubtitle: Configure environment variables for your deployment
deploy.renderDesc: Full cloud platform with free tier. One-click deploy via GitHub — no API key needed!
deploy.vercelDesc: FREE frontend cloud. Direct upload — no GitHub needed. Perfect for sites & APIs.
deploy.deployingSubtitle: Your project is being deployed to the cloud
deploy.successSubtitle: Your project is now live on the internet
deploy.noFile: Please upload a ZIP file first

help.title: Help & Guide
help.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Gold_Crew

what.title: What is Gold_Crew?
what.desc: Gold_Crew is your all-in-one deployment control center. Upload a ZIP file, configure your project, and deploy it live to Render or Vercel in seconds. No terminal needed. No complex setup. Just drag, drop, and go live.
what.feat1Desc: Telegram, Discord, WhatsApp bots deployed in 1 click
what.feat2Desc: Static sites, React, Next.js — all supported
what.feat3Desc: REST APIs, Express, Fastify deployed instantly

keys.title: How to Get Your API Keys
keys.desc: You need API keys for real deployments. Each platform requires a token to authenticate your account.

github.desc: Required for all deployments. Allows Gold_Crew to create repos and push your code.
github.s4: Copy the token and paste it in Settings

render.desc: Add your Render API key for 100% automatic deploys — Gold_Crew creates the service and waits for the build. Or deploy manually with one click.
render.s1: Just add your GitHub token (required for all platforms)
render.s2: Deploy and click the 'Deploy on Render' button
render.s3: Render reads the render.yaml and deploys automatically

vercel.desc: Needed to deploy to Vercel frontend cloud.
vercel.s3: Copy the token and paste it in Settings

deploy.title: How to Deploy
deploy.desc: Choose your project type and follow the steps. It's the same flow for all types — just upload your ZIP!

bot.title: Deploy a Bot
bot.desc: Discord, Telegram, WhatsApp, or any background service
bot.s1: Zip your bot project (include package.json or requirements.txt)
bot.s2: Upload the ZIP in the Deploy tab
bot.s3: Name your project and select 'Bot' type
bot.s5: Choose Render (recommended for bots) and deploy!

site.title: Deploy a Website
site.desc: Static sites, React, Vue, Next.js, or any frontend
site.s1: Zip your website project (with build script in package.json)
site.s2: Upload the ZIP in the Deploy tab
site.s3: Name your project and select 'Website' type
site.s4: Add any environment variables if needed
site.s5: Choose Vercel (recommended for sites) or Render and deploy!

api.title: Deploy an API
api.desc: Express, Fastify, Hono, or any backend service
api.s1: Zip your API project (include package.json with start script)
api.s2: Upload the ZIP in the Deploy tab
api.s3: Name your project and select 'API' type
api.s5: Choose Render or Vercel and deploy!

community.title: Join the Community
community.desc: Stay updated with new features, get help, and share your deployments with the community!

messages.title: Contact Admin
messages.subtitle: Send a message to the administrator
messages.emptyDesc: Type a message below to contact the admin. They will be notified and can respond.
messages.noConversationsDesc: Users will appear here when they send you a message
